label: Demo Sales
description: Demo sales data by region (loaded from seeds/demo_sales.csv)

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date of the sales row (YYYY-MM-DD). Data runs from 2026-01-03 to 2026-04-27. Use for time-series charts and date truncation (week, month).

columns.name: region
columns.description: Sales region. Values: North, South, West. Use for regional breakdowns and comparisons.

columns.name: product
columns.description: Product sold. Values: 'Batch Run Sneakers', 'Fuzzy Match Socks', 'Deadlock Laces'. Use for product-level performance analysis.

columns.name: units
columns.description: Number of units sold in this row. Integer. Aggregate with SUM for total volume metrics.

columns.name: revenue
columns.description: Revenue in USD for this row (integer, no decimals). Aggregate with SUM for total revenue. Derived from units × unit price per product.
